settings.title: Daum Postcode Settings
settings.description: Configure the display mode and style of Daum Postcode service.
settings.notice: Daum Postcode service is free to use without API key.

guide.title: Usage Guide
guide.step1: Select display mode. Popup opens in a new window, Layer displays as an overlay on the current page.
guide.step2: If popup mode is selected, set the popup window size.
guide.step3: Customize the postcode search window style by setting the theme color.

display_mode.label: Display Mode
display_mode.hint: Select how to display the address search window.

popup_width.label: Popup Width (px)
popup_width.hint: Window width used in popup mode.

popup_height.label: Popup Height (px)
popup_height.hint: Window height used in popup mode.

theme_color.label: Theme Color
theme_color.hint: Theme color for the postcode search window. (e.g., #1D4ED8)
